$schema_note: Backend architecture definition — Node.js API for the Legacy IT Student Portal

runtime.process_model: Single process per container; horizontal scale via multiple containers + Socket.IO Redis adapter when needed

layers.routes: Express routers per module; bind paths to controllers; apply per-route middleware (auth, RBAC, validation, rate limits)
layers.controllers: Translate HTTP ⇄ service calls; no business logic; shape responses
layers.services: All business rules (BR-01…BR-16); transactional orchestration; emit domain events (notifications, audit)
layers.repositories: Prisma data access only; no business rules
layers.infrastructure: OSAS client, mailer, storage client, realtime gateway, job scheduler, crypto utilities

apps/api/src/: app.ts (express wiring), server.ts (bootstrap), config/ (env parsing via zod)
middleware/ → authenticate.ts, authorize.ts, validate.ts, rateLimit.ts, errorHandler.ts, requestLogger.ts
infra/ → prisma.ts, osasClient.ts, mailer.ts, storage.ts, realtime.ts, jobs.ts, qrCrypto.ts

key_libraries.validation: zod (shared schemas from packages/shared; validate() middleware parses body/query/params, strips unknown keys)
key_libraries.auth: jsonwebtoken (access), crypto-random refresh tokens hashed with SHA-256 at rest, argon2 for passwords
key_libraries.qr_payload: Node crypto — AES-256-GCM encryption for QR payloads, HMAC-SHA256-derived rotating tokens

student_login: POST /auth/login { studentId|email, password } with role hint 'student'
API calls OSAS verify endpoint (server-to-server) with the credentials
OSAS returns identity + status; status must be active/current — alumni/inactive rejected (403 STUDENT_INACTIVE)
Profile upserted locally (student_id, program, year, section, status, photo); osas_last_synced_at stamped
Access JWT (15 min) issued + rotating refresh cookie (7 days, httpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax); device info recorded
staff_login: POST /auth/login with local credentials → argon2 verify → lockout counter on failure (5 tries / 15 min lock)
Optional email OTP step for admin roles when enabled
authentication_flow.refresh: POST /auth/refresh — rotate refresh token (old revoked, reuse detection revokes the whole family), new access JWT

qr_session_engine.start: Faculty POST /sessions {offeringId, scheduleId} → validates assignment + no duplicate open session → creates class_session with a random per-session secret (server-only)
qr_session_engine.token_rotation: token = HMAC-SHA256(sessionSecret, floor(now/60s)) truncated; payload {sessionId, token, issuedAt} encrypted with AES-256-GCM → pushed to faculty room via Socket.IO every 60s (GET fallback for polling)
qr_session_engine.static_mode: If session.qr_mode = 'static' (admin-allowed, per-session), a single non-rotating encrypted payload is issued and the session is flagged reduced_security for reports
qr_session_engine.scan: Student POST /attendance/scan {payload} → decrypt + integrity check → window check (±1) → session open + before cutoff → enrollment check → INSERT attendance_record (unique(session_id, student_id) makes duplicates a no-op 409 handled as 'already recorded') → status computed from server clock vs grace/cutoff → Socket.IO event to session room
qr_session_engine.close: Manual close or auto-close cron at cutoff → unscanned enrolled students bulk-marked Absent → summary snapshot stored → room closed

background_jobs.name: session-autoclose
background_jobs.action: Close open sessions past cutoff; auto-mark absents (BR-14)

background_jobs.name: osas-nightly-sync
background_jobs.action: Sync students, schedules, calendar exceptions from OSAS; write osas_sync_logs; alert admins on failure

background_jobs.name: session-pregen
background_jobs.action: Generate today's class_sessions from schedules minus calendar exceptions (holidays/suspensions); add makeup/special-event sessions (BR-15)

background_jobs.name: at-risk-scan
background_jobs.action: Detect 3-consecutive or ≥20% absences; notify student + adviser (BR-07)

background_jobs.name: token-cleanup
background_jobs.action: Purge expired refresh tokens and stale notifications (>90 days read)

rooms.session:{id}: Faculty roster view — receives scan events {studentId, name, status, scannedAt} and rotating QR payloads (faculty sockets only)

realtime.fallback: Roster falls back to 10s polling if the socket drops

error_handling.shape: { error: { code, message, details? } } — machine-readable code + human message; zod issues in details
error_handling.policy: Services throw typed ApiError; central errorHandler maps to HTTP status, logs with request ID; 5xx never leak internals

conventions.api_style: REST, versioned at /api/v1, plural nouns, kebab-case paths, camelCase JSON
conventions.pagination: ?page=&pageSize= (max 100) → { data, meta: { page, pageSize, total, totalPages } }
conventions.filtering: Explicit whitelisted query params per endpoint; free-text ?search= where supported
conventions.dates: ISO-8601 UTC in/out; conversion to Asia/Manila is presentation-only
conventions.soft_delete: deleted_at column; default scopes exclude deleted rows
conventions.audit: audit() helper called in services for every mutating action with actor, entity, before/after
